programme.desc: Una mujer embarazada, su novio y su hermana hacen un recorrido en bote por un manglar, donde son aterrorizados por un cocodrilo asesino.

programme.title: Axe to Grind
programme.desc: La leyenda de las películas de bajo presupuesto, la actriz Debbie Wilkins, acaba de ser reemplazada por una tierna piel de 23 años en la cama de su amante. Peor aún, se ha quedado fuera del nuevo protagónico. Debbie no toma bien este rechazo y afrenta.

programme.title: Clinton Road
programme.desc: Existe un tramo de diez millas de carretera en Nueva Jersey que ha ganado notoriedad. Leyendas de asesinatos, apariciones, lo oculto y lo paranormal rodean el área. Es considerado uno de los lugares más misteriosos de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney, to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter, Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fill in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton) comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can affect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson, the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler in to a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: Best Of
programme.desc: It's action time! Prepare to be wowed by crazy flips and heart-pumping fun in Best of Teeterboard.

programme.title: 60-Min Special: Axel, Totem & Saltimbanco -- Cirque du Soleil
programme.desc: Strap in for nonstop colorful action with Axel, Totem and Saltimbanco featuring high-octane acts and much more.

programme.title: Gravity Defied: Cirque du Soleil
programme.desc: Spectacular acrobatics, immersive artistry, and unique athleticism unite in Gravity Defied: Cirque du Soleil!

programme.title: Cirque Du Soleil Presents: O
programme.desc: The full production of O, recorded live!

programme.title: Carrera Contra el Tiempo
programme.desc: Deacon es un ex agente que se despierta en una habitación de hotel y se da cuenta de que le han drogado y extirpado un riñón. Él y su hermano siguen la pista del tráfico de órganos para vengarse. Juntos se enfrentarán a todos los obstáculos hasta encontrar a los responsables, sin importarles que sus vidas sean el precio que tengan que pagar en su búsqueda de venganza

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un viejo demonio aparece en un pequeño pueblo de Mississippi dejando un reguero de muerte y destrucción. La única esperanza de supervivencia es un cazador de criaturas diabólicas que se ha enfrentado anteriormente a este terror. Colaborando con un agente del FBI, buscará la forma de destruir al demonio.

programme.title: La verdadera historia de la banda de Kelly
programme.desc: Esta película nos muestra la juventud de Ned Kelly y observamos su vida hasta el final. Las motivaciones de Kelly se revelan y las tragedias que rodean a su pandilla se muestran de una manera intensa y poderosa, comenzando con el amor de una madre por su hijo.

programme.title: Lockhart: Liberando el Talisman
programme.desc: La vida normal de un hombre da un vuelco cuando hereda un antiguo artefacto de cristal y se convierte en "la clave" para liberar al mundo del dominio de la esclavitud energética y del Gobierno Mundial Único clandestino. Después de un intenso y peligroso trabajo de detective, Jon Lockhart descubre que la familia Lockhart ha estado ocultando el cristal, también conocido como "El Corazón", de los malvados Illuminati durante los últimos 1.000 años, desde la época de Robert the Bruce y las Cruzadas. El Corazón de Cristal contiene un código científico que puede generar suficiente energía limpia e ilimitada para alimentar al mundo entero. Ahora Jon debe encontrar una manera de proteger el secreto de su familia y el futuro suministro de energía manteniendo el Corazón de Cristal a salvo de la élite "Illuminati", que no se detendrá ante nada para encontrar el corazón y finalmente controlar el suministro de energía del mundo para siempre.

programme.title: Entrenado para Matar
programme.desc: Un agente del servicio secreto británico se enfrenta a la tarea de perseguir y eliminar a un terrorista suicida nacido en Gran Bretaña y su célula terrorista.

programme.title: Agua Profunda
programme.desc: Un operativo encubierto se despierta y se encuentra encarcelado en un sitio negro de la CIA en un submarino.

programme.title: El Último Vikingo
programme.desc: Un joven vikingo llega a Gran Bretaña buscando aventuras, pero deberá sobrevivir cuando su clan es asesinado.

programme.title: Fuerza Letal
programme.desc: El comando Karan Singh Dogra y la inspectora Bhavna Reddy compiten contra el tiempo para frustrar un ataque terrorista. Sin embargo, pronto se dan cuenta de que descifrar la conspiración del autor intelectual Buraq podría ser más difícil de lo que imaginaban.

programme.title: Everly
programme.desc: Una mujer desesperada atrapada en su departamento debe defenderse de decenas de asesinos enviados por su despiadado ex, un nefasto capo de la droga.

programme.title: Lockhart: Liberando el Talisman
programme.desc: La vida normal de un hombre da un vuelco cuando hereda un antiguo artefacto de cristal y se convierte en "la clave" para liberar al mundo del dominio de la esclavitud energética y del Gobierno Mundial Único clandestino. Después de un intenso y peligroso trabajo de detective, Jon Lockhart descubre que la familia Lockhart ha estado ocultando el cristal, también conocido como "El Corazón", de los malvados Illuminati durante los últimos 1.000 años, desde la época de Robert the Bruce y las Cruzadas. El Corazón de Cristal contiene un código científico que puede generar suficiente energía limpia e ilimitada para alimentar al mundo entero. Ahora Jon debe encontrar una manera de proteger el secreto de su familia y el futuro suministro de energía manteniendo el Corazón de Cristal a salvo de la élite "Illuminati", que no se detendrá ante nada para encontrar el corazón y finalmente controlar el suministro de energía del mundo para siempre.

programme.title: Entrenado para Matar
programme.desc: Un agente del servicio secreto británico se enfrenta a la tarea de perseguir y eliminar a un terrorista suicida nacido en Gran Bretaña y su célula terrorista.

programme.title: Agua Profunda
programme.desc: Un operativo encubierto se despierta y se encuentra encarcelado en un sitio negro de la CIA en un submarino.

programme.title: El Último Vikingo
programme.desc: Un joven vikingo llega a Gran Bretaña buscando aventuras, pero deberá sobrevivir cuando su clan es asesinado.

programme.title: Ring: El Aro Espiral
programme.desc: Un joven patólogo entra en contacto con un videotape mortal mientras investiga la muerte de un amigo.

programme.title: El Atrapa Sueños
programme.desc: La película se centra en dos hermanas separadas que, junto con sus amigas, se atrincheran en un torbellino de violencia de 48 horas después de una experiencia traumática en un festival de música underground.

programme.title: O Sono da Morte
programme.desc: Jessie e Mark decidem adotar Cody, um menino que tem pavor de dormir. Inicialmente, eles acreditam que a fobia se origina do passado traumático do garoto. Mas logo descobrem a verdade: os sonhos de Cody são projetados na realidade, e muitas vezes o que se materializa são pesadelos horríveis e mortais.

programme.title: La Posesión
programme.desc: Después de que una joven sea secuestrada, sus captores pronto se dan cuenta de que en realidad pueden ser ellos los que están en peligro y que esta joven tiene un oscuro secreto en su interior.

programme.title: Instinto Materno
programme.desc: Después de un trauma terrible, una madre soltera se muda a una granja aislada en el campo con su hija. Muy pronto, comienzan a suceder cosas siniestras y sus instintos maternos volverán a ser puestos a prueba. Hasta dónde llegará esta madre para proteger a su hija?

programme.title: La Invocación
programme.desc: Akane es una profesora de instituto que escucha el rumor de que sus alumnos tienen en su poder un vídeo del suicidio de una persona. En un primer momento no cree que sea cierto, pero cuando una de sus estudiantes aparece muerta después de ver un vídeo, ella y su novio se verán envueltos en una espiral terrorífica creada por el hombre que aparece en el vídeo, Kashiwada. Su intenció era crear el caos en el mundo trayendo a Sadako de vuelta con el poder de su maldición. Ahora Akane deberá enfrentarse a Sadako y Kashiwada...

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: 1936. Los Wollners, una familia de inmigrantes alemanes viviendo en Maryland, reciben instrucciones del Tercer Reich para hacer de anfitriones del Profesor Richard Wirth. La familia se ve obligada a participar en un experimento esotérico relacionado con unas runas vikingas precolombinas. En 2007, dos hermanos van a Town Creek con la intención de desentrañar el misterio que envuelve a los Wollners

programme.title: Ecos Mortales
programme.desc: Un cataclismo que quiebra las barreras entre nuestro mundo y el próximo ha dejado "Remanentes": fantasmas de los muertos que se transforman en parte de la vida cotidiana. Luego de 9 años de tranquila coexistencia con los vivos, un Remanente amenaza a una adolescente, empujándola a una misión que cambiará el curso de su vida para siempre.

programme.title: Extraño pero Cierto
programme.desc: Una mujer sorprende a la familia de su novio recién fallecido al comunicarles que espera un hijo suyo.

programme.title: Crepitus - El Payaso Caníbal
programme.desc: Elizabeth, de 17 años, y su hermana menor, Sam, dejan a su madre alcohólica y maltratadora para vivir en la casa de su abuelo fallecido. Pero no esperaban que su nueva vida fuera aún más aterradora. Después de descubrir que su familia tuvo un pasado aterrador y que han ocurrido cosas terribles en la casa, Elizabeth y Sam son perseguidas por un payaso caníbal llamado Crepitus.

programme.title: La Posesión
programme.desc: Después de que una joven sea secuestrada, sus captores pronto se dan cuenta de que en realidad pueden ser ellos los que están en peligro y que esta joven tiene un oscuro secreto en su interior.

programme.title: Instinto Materno
programme.desc: Después de un trauma terrible, una madre soltera se muda a una granja aislada en el campo con su hija. Muy pronto, comienzan a suceder cosas siniestras y sus instintos maternos volverán a ser puestos a prueba. Hasta dónde llegará esta madre para proteger a su hija?

programme.title: La Invocación
programme.desc: Akane es una profesora de instituto que escucha el rumor de que sus alumnos tienen en su poder un vídeo del suicidio de una persona. En un primer momento no cree que sea cierto, pero cuando una de sus estudiantes aparece muerta después de ver un vídeo, ella y su novio se verán envueltos en una espiral terrorífica creada por el hombre que aparece en el vídeo, Kashiwada. Su intenció era crear el caos en el mundo trayendo a Sadako de vuelta con el poder de su maldición. Ahora Akane deberá enfrentarse a Sadako y Kashiwada...

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: 1936. Los Wollners, una familia de inmigrantes alemanes viviendo en Maryland, reciben instrucciones del Tercer Reich para hacer de anfitriones del Profesor Richard Wirth. La familia se ve obligada a participar en un experimento esotérico relacionado con unas runas vikingas precolombinas. En 2007, dos hermanos van a Town Creek con la intención de desentrañar el misterio que envuelve a los Wollners

programme.title: Ecos Mortales

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
Just Go with It
programme.desc: Un cirujano plástico trata de seducir a una maestra de escuela mucho más joven que él, para lograrlo recluta a su fiel asistente para que finja ser su ex esposa, con el fin de encubrir una mentira sin importancia. Cuando más mentiras aparecen, los hijos de su asistente se ven involucrados y todo el mundo se dirige a un fin de semana en Hawái que cambiará la vida de todos

programme.title: The Three Burials of Melquíades Estrada
Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
Just Go with It
programme.desc: Un cirujano plástico trata de seducir a una maestra de escuela mucho más joven que él, para lograrlo recluta a su fiel asistente para que finja ser su ex esposa, con el fin de encubrir una mentira sin importancia. Cuando más mentiras aparecen, los hijos de su asistente se ven involucrados y todo el mundo se dirige a un fin de semana en Hawái que cambiará la vida de todos

programme.title: La Vuelta Al Mundo Con Willy Fog
La Abeja Maya
programme.desc: La curiosa abeja Maya y su amigo Willy salvarán a la colmena de la avaricia del consejero de la reina y pondrán fin a años de hostilidad entre abejas y avispas. Maya es una abeja recién nacida muy vivaracha que no sigue las reglas de la colmena

programme.title: Los Picapiedras
programme.desc: Pedro Picapiedra y Pablo Mármol, un par de hombres que reflejaban la clase media de la sociedad estadounidense con sus salidas al campo, barbacoas en el jardín, partidas de bolos y un vehículo primitivo, y en sus esposas, Betty y Vilma, quienes tenían que aguantar las ideas de Pedro y la complicidad obligatoria de Pablo, de donde nunca salían bien

programme.title: Pinky y Cerebro
programme.desc: dos ratones albinos alterados genéticamente que viven en los laboratorios Acme. En cada episodio Cerebro idea un plan para poder conquistar al mundo junto a su compañero, Pinky

programme.title: Halcones Galacticos
programme.desc: El Capitán Telescopio reclutó a los Halcones Galácticos para combatir a Monstruón, su líder Rayo de Plata y su compañero Halcón Vigía, los super gemelos invencibles Acerino y Acerina, Vaquero, el guitarrista y piloto estrella de su increíble nave el Espectro, y del planeta de los mimos, el Niño de Cobre

programme.title: El Gran Chaparral
programme.desc: Dos familias del oeste norteamericano, los Cannon y los Montoya, dueños de grandes parcelas de territorio en Arizona. La familia Cannon estaba liderada por John, un fornido ex oficial del Ejército de la Unión Estadounidense, ahora colono aventurero decidido a luchar contra la naturaleza y los apaches para mantener su rancho en pie, el -High Chaparral-, y su refinada esposa mexicana Victoria, hija de otro poderoso ranchero de la región apodado -El León de Sonora-, Don Sebastian Montoya

programme.title: Tierra de Gigantes
programme.desc: Las aventuras de la tripulación y los pasajeros de un transporte suborbital después de que este se hubiera visto transportado accidentalmente a un mundo en el que todas las formas de vida tienen unas proporciones enormes en comparación con los personajes principales. El aspecto de estos gigantes es enteramente humano, pero son doce veces más grandes

programme.title: Joe 90
programme.desc: Joe McClaine es un niño de 9 años cuyo padre adoptivo ha desarrollado un invento con el cual se logra incorporar -información- a un cerebro. Gracias a esto, le transfiere conocimientos y habilidades a la mente de su hijo; y Joe adquiere casi inmediatamente la capacidad de ser un piloto de pruebas, un neurocirujano, etc., según sea necesario. Combinado con su inocente apariencia, Joe se convierte en un agente especial de la WIN, la Red Mundial de Inteligencia

programme.title: She-ra
programme.desc: La guerrera Adora se une a la rebelión tras descubrir una espada mágica y su identidad como la legendaria heroína She-Ra, pero su mejor amiga se queda con los hordianos

programme.title: Lucky Luke
programme.desc: El pistolero Lucky Luke. El héroe del salvaje Oeste, enfrentado a delicuentes como a los hermanos Dalton

programme.title: Los Caballeros del Zodiaco
programme.desc: Cada vez que las fuerzas del mal ponen en peligro a la humanidad, los caballeros portan armaduras inspiradas en cada una de las 88 constelaciones que dominan el firmamento. En la batalla se sirven del “cosmos”, energía que rodea y equilibra a todos los elementos del universo

programme.title: Hawai 5.0
programme.desc: La unidad especial de la policía estatal que solo responde al Gobernador de Hawaii. Trabajan con la policía de Honolulu para combatir los barrios del estado insular. El detective implacable Steve McGarrett encabeza esta unidad especial de la policía de Hawaii

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: El teniente Thero Kojak es un incorruptible y poco ortodoxo policía de Manhattan del departamento de policía de Nueva York, investiga crímenes en el distrito de Manhattan Sur en una comisaría con el capitán Frank McNeil como jefe y con compañeros como Stavros, sagaz y sin pelos en la lengua, de excelente humor e inimitable estilo

programme.title: Hong Kong Phooey
programme.desc: Hong Kong Phooey es un héroe al estilo karateca que, asistido por su gato -spok-, libra a la ciudad de los criminales. Gracias a su identidad secreta (Penrod Pooch), puede estar al tanto de lo que ocurre trabajando como conserje en una comisaría

programme.title: Los Picapiedras
programme.desc: Pedro Picapiedra y Pablo Mármol, un par de hombres que reflejaban la clase media de la sociedad estadounidense con sus salidas al campo, barbacoas en el jardín, partidas de bolos y un vehículo primitivo, y en sus esposas, Betty y Vilma, quienes tenían que aguantar las ideas de Pedro y la complicidad obligatoria de Pablo, de donde nunca salían bien

programme.title: He-Man
programme.desc: El adolescente Adam y su heroico escuadrón de inadaptados descubren el legendario poder de Grayskull y su inevitable destino, defender a Eternia del siniestro Skeletor

programme.title: La Vuelta Al Mundo Con Willy Fog
Calabozos y Dragones
programme.desc: Historia de unos niños que se montan en una atracción llamada Dungeons & Dragons y, misteriosamente, son transportados a un nuevo mundo lleno de seres fantásticos. El Amo del Calabozo daba un arma y un poder a cada niño

programme.title: Scooby Doo
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo es un perro de raza gran danés que habla y vive un sinfín de aventuras junto a sus amigos, un grupo de adolescentes que regresa de cualquier actividad en una camioneta decorada al estilo Flower Power llamada Máquina del Misterio . Sin embargo, su viaje siempre se ve interrumpido por un monstruo, fantasma o suceso paranormal que aterroriza a los residentes de la zona

programme.title: The Knack... and How to Get It
programme.desc: Desperate to improve his luck with women, London schoolteacher Colin (Michael Crawford) enlists his artist roommate, Tom (Donal Donnelly), to help drag a brass bed back to their flat. Along the way they meet Nancy (Rita Tushingham), a new girl in town, who follows them home. There they encounter Tolen (Ray Brooks), the third roommate and a consummate lady-killer. He tries to help Colin seduce Nanc

programme.title: Eight on the Lam
programme.desc: A widower with seven children, Henry Dimsdale (Bob Hope) is employed as a bank teller. After finding $10,000 on the street, Henry takes the money home, but quickly finds out that the cash came from his workplace. Soon Henry is on the run with his kids, while their baby sitter, Golda (Phyllis Diller), tries to throw her none-too-bright police officer boyfriend, Jasper Lynch (Jonathan Winters), off

programme.title: Casanova Brown
programme.desc: Casanova Brown (Gary Cooper) is about to marry Madge (Anita Louise) when he learns that his former wife, Isabel (Teresa Wright), has just had a baby that belongs to him, and plans to put the child up for adoption. Casanova runs out on the wedding, disguises himself as a doctor, visits the hospital where his infant daughter is being held and runs off with her to a hotel, where he does his best to c

programme.title: Warriors Five
programme.desc: An American paratrooper (Jack Palance), aided by group of Italian guerrillas, starts a delaying action against the Germans.

programme.title: Raiders of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: A fierce pirate, Barbarossa (John Payne) captures a Spanish ship with bravado. Discovering the beautiful Contessa Alida (Donna Reed) on board, Barbarossa falls for the elegant aristocrat, but she is to wed the sailor Jose Salcedo (Gerald Mohr). Although Alida is resistant to Barbarossa's charms, she slowly warms up to him, particularly after she discovers that Salcedo isn't the man that she though

programme.title: He Ran All the Way
programme.desc: Nick Robey is a dim-witted thug who lives with his mother and scrapes by on petty crime. He and his slick accomplice, Al, plot a big-time payroll robbery, but their plan goes horribly awry when they're discovered by a police officer and Al is shot. Nick shoots back, hitting the officer and running for safety. While seeking cover, Nick meets Peggy Dobbs, a lonely young girl. They return to Peggy's

programme.title: The Devil's Brigade
programme.desc: At the onset of World War II, American Lt. Col. Robert Frederick (William Holden) is put in charge of a unit called the 1st Special Service Force, composed of elite Canadian commandos and undisciplined American soldiers. With Maj. Alan Crown (Cliff Robertson) leading the Canadians and Maj. Cliff Bricker (Vince Edwards) the acting head of the American contingent, there is initial tension -- but the

programme.title: Beach Red
programme.desc: Ordered to help secure a heavily defended Japanese island during World War II, Captain MacDonald (Cornel Wilde) and his Marines land on "Beach Red" and proceed inland against stubborn, murderous resistance. MacDonald is supported by his tough-as-nails gunnery sergeant (Rip Torn), soulful Private Egan (Burr DeBenning) and a group of stalwart Marines who try to block out the horrors that surround th

programme.title: Shadow of Suspicion
programme.desc: A jewelry firm hires private eye James Dale (Peter Cookson) and his partner Everett Northrup (Tim Ryan) to find a valuable necklace after a manager steals it.

programme.title: Return From the Ashes
programme.desc: An expert chess player, Stanislaus Pilgrin (Maximilian Schell) is also an unrepentant cad and schemer. Looking for a way to inherit a fortune, Stanislaus marries Dr. Michele Wolf (Ingrid Thulin), a rich Jewish widow. Later, however, he becomes involved with his wife's stepdaughter, Fabienne (Samantha Eggar), resulting in a complicated web of seduction and deception that ends in murder. Will the du

programme.title: Dance With Me Henry
programme.desc: Children help an amusement-park owner (Lou Costello) and his buddy (Bud Abbott) get out of trouble with gangsters.

programme.title: Cop
programme.desc: Los Angeles police Detective Lloyd Hopkins (James Woods) gets in trouble with his superiors for his insubordinate ways. When Lloyd realizes that he's on the trail of a serial killer, he is told not to pursue the case, but he presses forward anyway, fiercely intent on catching the murderer. programme.title: Carbon Copy
programme.desc: Walter Whitney is a successful executive who resides in an upscale Southern California suburb. Like all of his friends and neighbors, Walter is white, and he is shocked when he learns he has a son he never knew about -- black teen Roger Porter (Denzel Washington). programme.title: Don't Worry, We'll Think of a Title
programme.desc: Spies mistake a diner cook (Morey Amsterdam) for a wayward Soviet astronaut in an American college town.

programme.title: Bikini Beach
programme.desc: Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon) are primed to hit the beach for some fun in the sun. The only thing standing in the way of their good times is curmudgeonly developer Harvey Huntington Honeywagon (Keenan Wynn), who is intent on turning their teenage hotspot into a grazing ground for seniors. programme.title: A Midsummer Night's Dream
programme.desc: While preparations are underway for the marriage of Athenian duke Theseus (Derek Godfrey) and Amazon queen Hippolyta (Barbara Jefford), fairy king Oberon (Ian Richardson) and his tricky jester, Puck (Ian Holm), make mischief with the indiscriminate use of a powerful love potion. Lysander (David Warner) and Demetrius (Michael Jayston) both fall for Helena (Diana Rigg), raising the jealousy of Hermi

programme.title: Kiss Me, Stupid
programme.desc: When popular singer Dino (Dean Martin) stops for gas in a small town near Las Vegas, mechanic Barney (Cliff Osmond) disables his car. Barney, who writes songs with local teacher Orville (Ray Walston), wants Dino to sing some of their compositions. Orville invites Dino over, but sends his wife, Zelda (Felicia Farr), away so Dino can't hit on her. He then hires prostitute Polly (Kim Novak) to play h

programme.title: The Sultan's Daughter
programme.desc: An American woos the daughter (Ann Corio) of an Arab (Charles Butterworth) who's defending his oil fields from Germans.

programme.title: Trapeze
programme.desc: Mike Ribble (Burt Lancaster) is a hard-drinking tent pitcher. His career as a famous trapeze artist ended years ago after attempting a triple somersault gave him a permanent limp. Young acrobat Tino (Tony Curtis) tracks Mike down and asks him to teach him the dangerous stunt. Mike first refuses but is convinced by his ex-lover, Rosa (Katy Jurado). Mike and Tino have a shot at the big time, but the

programme.title: Great North
programme.desc: Martin J. Dignard and William Reeve examine the landscape of the Arctic and long-standing Inuit traditions.

programme.title: Salt and Pepper
programme.desc: Christopher Pepper (Peter Lawford) and Charles Salt (Sammy Davis Jr.) are hip Soho nightclub owners enjoying the good life -- until a secret agent turns up dead in their club. They find her diary and, pursuing the case on their own, discover a sinister plot to overthrow the British government, masterminded by a certain Col. Woodstock (John Le Mesurier). programme.title: School for Unclaimed Girls
programme.desc: A wayard teenager (Madeline Hinde) escapes from reform school where she is serving time for stabbing the boyfriend of her mother (Renee Asherson).

programme.title: Pressure Point
programme.desc: Frustrated by his inability to help an African-American patient who hates whites, a psychiatrist (Peter Falk) asks his superior (Sidney Poitier) to release him from the case. The superior relates a case from his own past during World War II when he treated a young Nazi (Bobby Darin) who despised blacks. Explaining the tragic results of the case, the older psychiatrist encourages his younger collea

programme.title: Pumpkin
programme.desc: Carolyn's (Christina Ricci) sorority sisters set their sights on the Sorority of the Year award and coaching challenged athletes is their ticket to the trophy. But when the queen of formals finds herself mentoring Pumpkin (Hank Harris), a disabled athlete, their two worlds collide.

programme.title: Allotment Wives
programme.desc: An Army officer investigates a bigamy racket in which scheming women marry soldiers to collect their government checks.

programme.title: Moulin Rouge
programme.desc: Visually exquisite biopic of Toulouse-Lautrec, the crippled painter whose work perfectly captured the spirit of Bohemian Paris in the naughty 1890s. Portrayed as an embittered loner, he is tormented by his doomed relationships with prostitute Marie Charlet and sympathetic model Myriamme.

programme.title: The Mini-Skirt Mob
programme.desc: The leader (Diane McBain) of a motorcycle gang harasses her ex-boyfriend and his bride (Sherry Jackson) on their highway honeymoon.

programme.title: Cycle Savages
programme.desc: A biker (Bruce Dern) and his gang go after an artist (Chris Robinson) for whom his girlfriend posed in the nude.

programme.title: The Glory Stompers
programme.desc: Chino (Dennis Hopper) is the head of the Black Souls, a California motorcycle gang at odds with another crew, the Glory Stompers. One day, Chino and his fellow gang members kidnap the head of the Stompers, Darryl (Jody McCrea), and his girlfriend, Chris (Chris Noel). After a heavy beating, the cyclists abandon Darryl but take Chris with them to Mexico. While Chris faces threats of abuse, Darryl te

programme.title: The Savage Seven
programme.desc: A motorcycle gang terrorizes a Native American reservation -- until the gang's leader, Kisum (Adam Roarke), falls for waitress Marcia Little Hawk (Joanna Frank). The two groups soon put aside their differences to team up against crooked Fillmore (Mel Berger), who employs Marcia and her brother, Johnnie (Robert Walker). But Fillmore decides to encourage dissent among them, arranging for the death o

programme.title: Diary of a Madman
programme.desc: When Judge Simon Cordier (Vincent Price) goes to see Louis Girot (Harvey Stephens), a prisoner he sentenced to death, the criminal insists he is not guilty and that he is inhabited by an evil spirit. Cordier dismisses Girot's claims, but he becomes unnerved when Girot lights himself on fire to supposedly end the demonic possession. After the visit, Cordier, beset by insomnia, begins to have odd vi

programme.title: The Pit and the Pendulum
programme.desc: Elizabeth Barnard Medina (Barbara Steele) has died in the prime of life, and her brother, Francis (John Kerr), wants to know why. programme.title: The Premature Burial
programme.desc: Based on Edgar Allan Poe's story about a cataleptic Englishman obsessed with the fear of being buried alive.

programme.title: The Black Sleep
programme.desc: Victorian Sir Joel (Basil Rathbone) prepares for his wife's brain surgery by practicing on locals supplied by a Gypsy (Akim Tamiroff).

programme.desc: A jet pilot finds himself assigned to the barren wastes of Alaska where it becomes his duty to man an observation post.

programme.desc: An English rubber planter (Jack Hawkins) and his wife (Claudette Colbert) have marital trouble during a native uprising.

programme.title: Namu, the Killer Whale

programme.title: Hero's Island
programme.desc: After their master dies, servants Thomas (Brendan Dillon) and Devon (Kate Manx) and their children become homesteaders on a coastal island.
